title: Neon Nexus
description: A cyberpunk sci-fi environment rendered in Blender Cycles. Neon lighting, holographic surfaces, and futuristic architecture.

title: Ghost Protocol
description: A cybernetic soldier sculpted in ZBrush, rigged in Maya, and textured with Substance Painter.

title: Neo City 2099
description: An expansive cyberpunk city rendered with Cinema 4D and Redshift. Rain, neon, and scale were the three design pillars.

title: Phantom Object
description: A high-end product visualization demonstrating photorealistic material work and studio-quality lighting in Blender.

title: Fractal Void
description: Procedural abstract art created entirely with Blender's Geometry Nodes, exploring the mathematics of fractals and space.

title: Iron Wraith
description: A biomechanical predator modeled and rigged in Autodesk Maya, rendered with Arnold for cinematic quality.
